doorway.text: A low wooden hut stands in a clearing, its {{adjective}} roof mostly intact. The door is wedged shut from the inside.

choices.label: Force the door with your shoulder.

main_room.text: The single room holds a cold stove, empty shelves, and a workbench covered in rusted tools. A trapdoor in the floor is sealed with a padlock.

choices.label: Break the padlock on the trapdoor.

cellar.text: A root cellar, surprisingly dry. Rows of sealed jars line wooden shelves. Some are cloudy but most look intact.

door_splinter.text: A wooden shard drives into your shoulder as the door gives way.

bad_air.text: Stale gas hits you as the trapdoor opens. You retch and stagger back, vision blurring.
